Our Introduction

Built in Northern Virginia.
For Northern Virginia.

Since 2001, we've built 500+ decks across Loudoun, Fairfax, and Prince William counties — from modest backyard additions to full outdoor living spaces with screened porches, pergolas, and kitchens. We know Loudoun County's permit process, HOA requirements, and Virginia's climate better than anyone. Every project is personally overseen by Nick, and we don't consider a job done until you'd recommend us to your neighbor.

  • Trex Platinum Partner & TimberTech Certified — highest tier in Northern Virginia
  • 100% permit approval rate — we handle all HOA and county submissions for you
Decking
Fencing
Call For A Free Quote
Our Process

How We Bring Your Dream Deck To Life

01

Free Consultation

We visit your property to discuss your vision, evaluate the site, and take precise measurements.

02

Custom Design

Our experts create a detailed plan and 3D rendering tailored to your home and lifestyle.

03

Expert Build

Our licensed craftsmen construct your deck with precision, meeting all local codes and standards.

04

Enjoy & Warranty

We hand over your dream deck backed by our 5-year workmanship warranty, plus 25–50 year manufacturer warranties on all composite materials.

Hand Crafted Decks

High-Quality Custom Designs Custom-Engineered Construction

New Decks

Transform your outdoor living space with a custom-designed deck built to last.

Deck Resurfacing

Revitalize your old deck with premium materials, making it look brand new without the cost of a full rebuild.

Gazebo and
Pergola

Add functionality to your yard with a custom gazebo or pergola.

Custom
Porches

Extend your living space with a beautiful, weather-protected screened-in porch.

What We're Offering

Everything Your Outdoor
Space Needs

From ground-up deck construction to full outdoor living spaces, every project is custom-designed for your home, fully permitted, and backed by our warranty.

New Decks

Custom-designed and structurally engineered decks using premium composite or natural wood materials to expand your outdoor space.

Deck Resurfacing

Breathe new life into your existing deck frame with completely refreshed surface boards, modern railings, and updated stairs.

Outdoor Washing

Professional high-pressure washing and treatment services to remove years of grime, mold, and weather damage from your wood.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

"Nick and his team built us a 500 sqft Trex Transcend deck in Ashburn, from permit to final walkthrough in under 3 weeks. Every neighbor has asked who did it. Honest pricing, zero surprises, and they left the yard cleaner than they found it."

James R.

Ashburn, VA · Trex Composite Deck, 500 sqft

"We got 4 quotes. Loudoun Decks wasn’t the cheapest, but Nick came to the house, explained everything in detail, and showed us exactly why composite is worth it long-term. Two years later, our deck still looks brand new. Worth every penny."

Maria & Tom S.

Leesburg, VA · Composite Deck + Screened Porch

"They handled the HOA submission and Loudoun County permit themselves — I didn’t lift a finger on the paperwork. Deck was done in 10 days. The Trex Calm Shell color we chose looks incredible against our siding."

David K.

South Riding, VA · Deck Replacement + Railings

Find Your Answers

Frequently Asked
Questions

How long does it typically take to build a new deck?

The timeline depends on the size and complexity of the deck, as well as weather conditions. On average, a standard deck takes about 1 to 2 weeks from the day construction begins. We always provide a clear timeline during our consultation.

Do I need a permit to build a deck or fence?

In most counties, yes. But don't worry ldndecks handles the entire permitting process for you. We ensure all plans are compliant with local building codes, taking the paperwork off your hands.

What decking materials do you recommend for longevity?

We highly recommend composite or PVC decking for maximum durability and low maintenance. If you prefer natural wood, high-quality IPE or treated Redwood are excellent choices that can last decades with proper sealing and care.

Can you resurface my existing deck instead of replacing it?

Absolutely! If your deck's foundational framing and joists are still structurally sound, we can remove the old surface boards and railings, replacing them with brand new materials. This is a highly cost-effective way to get a 'new' deck.

Do you provide warranties on your work?

Yes. We stand behind our work with a 5-year workmanship warranty on all labor. On top of that, Trex composite decking carries a 25-year residential warranty and TimberTech/AZEK carries a 30-year warranty, both passed directly to you. Combined, you’re looking at decades of coverage from both materials and craftsmanship.

Find Loudoun Decks Online

You can also request information or view our business profile on trusted third-party platforms.
